nasb.text: but his disciples took him by night and let him down through an opening in the wall, lowering him in a large basket.

esv.text: but his disciples took him by night and let him down through an opening in the wall, lowering him in a basket.

cnv.text: 於是他的門徒就趁夜用大籃子把他從城牆上縋下去。

ccb.text: 他的门徒趁夜间用筐子把他从城墙上缒下去。

csbs.text: 然而他的门徒们趁夜把他带去，用筐子把他从城墙上缒了下去。
